Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "SKATECRAZY-CARPARKCHALLENGE-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Skate Crazy - Car Park Challenge.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the Amstrad CPC version
